text:
Created attachment 255671
[PATCH] devel/hs-ghc-events: update 0.19.0.1 → 0.20.0.0

0.20.0.0 - 2024-11-25

    Add pretty printing for timestamps (#92)
    Added --version option to CLI interface (#95)
    Support GHC 9.8 (#102)
    Add support for era profiling events (#103)
    Support GHC 9.10 (#105)
    Add support for the NonmovingPrunedSegment event (#107)
    Fix the type of the profCap field of ProfSampleCostCentre (#108)
